title: [codereview-pass2] handle_frame_rpl DAO handling does not extract target to call the new add_route with full assembled path; rebuild_routes is called inside process_dao but explicit call after route_updated=true is still missing per xc4d
description: P2 finding. The route_updated flag is set but not used to invoke add_route with path from assemble_path. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-nkxi
close_reason: All fixes applied: handle_frame_rpl now calls add_route with full path after route_updated=true via extract+lookup; add_route uses full assembled path + dedup for multi-hop; RoutingTable/HashMap clean. 3 codereview passes completed with all findings addressed and closed. Tests, clippy, fmt, cargo test all pass clean.
